name: Dolores Autocurricula

balance.source: btcli wallet overview --wallet-name dolores-test --netuid 523 --network test --json-output, 2026-07-08 after public registration and stake

chain_client: SubtensorChain read-only/dry-run/live gates implemented; first public live set_weights was submitted through a direct async substrate fallback after repo SDK testnet dry-run websocket hangs
commit_reveal_policy: Public netuid 523 has commit_reveal_weights_enabled=false as of the 2026-07-08 read-back; if it flips true later, live weights require explicit --allow-commit-reveal and are commit evidence rather than immediate metagraph read-back evidence
